song: I Learned It All in Fifteen Seconds
text: I Learned It All in Fifteen Seconds is about how fast the feed teaches you to feel. A cake with one good hand. A soldier coming home. A haircut. A subway heartbreak. You swipe away before the pain sets in and somehow it stays anyway.
